Green Tea Lightly oxidized, traditional Ceylon Green Tea, celebrated for its smooth, delicate flavor and pale jade liquor. Sourced from high-elevation estates in Sri Lanka.

Benefits:
▶ Rich in natural antioxidants (Polyphenols/Catechins).
▶ May aid in boosting metabolism and promoting vitality.
▶ Known to support focus and sustained energy without harsh jitters Tea Tea Tea Tea Tea Tea Tea Tea Tea Tea

Chili Powder Finely ground from sun-dried, selected red chilies, delivering an authentic flavor and rich, deep color. Known for its moderate, vibrant heat, perfect for savory Sri Lankan dishes.

Benefits:

Coconut Vinegar Naturally fermented from the sap of the coconut flower (not the milk), resulting in a mild, subtle sweetness and a tangy profile. A clear or slightly cloudy, pale amber to white liquid.

Benefits:
▶ Contains natural enzymes and beneficial bacteria that may support gut health.
▶ A lower glycemic alternative to other vinegars for dressing and cooking.
▶ Adds a distinct, traditional tang to sauces, marinades, and chutneys Coconut Products Coconut Products Coconut Products Coconut Products Coconut Products Coconut Products Coconut Products Coconut Products Coconut Products Coconut Products

Jasmine Eau de Parfum A classic, opulent fragrance capturing the pure, intoxicating scent of night-blooming Sri Lankan Jasmine. This enduring Eau de Parfum offers a deep, floral heart with subtle, green undertones.

Benefits:
▶ Aromatherapeutic properties are known to evoke feelings of calm and reduce stress.
▶The rich, floral scent promotes feelings of confidence and allure.
▶ A classic, enduring fragrance suitable for evening wear or special occasions. Cumin Powder (Kotta Malli) Finely ground from carefully dried cumin seeds, offering a warm, nutty, and essential aroma. This spice is fundamental to the depth and character of traditional Sri Lankan curries and spice blends.

Benefits:
▶ Known traditionally to aid in healthy digestion and reduce bloating.
▶ Contains antioxidants that help promote overall wellness.
▶ Essential for achieving the authentic flavor profile of South Asian cuisine. Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices

Black Pepper (Gammiris) Sourced from Sri Lanka, these sun-dried berries are known for their pungent, sharp, and lingering heat. Ceylon Black Pepper is highly valued globally for its robust essential oil content and distinctive aroma that enhances both savory and sweet dishes.

Benefits:
▶ Contains piperine, which is known to enhance the bioavailability of other nutrients.
▶ Traditionally used to aid in healthy digestion and alleviate cold symptoms.
▶ Adds a powerful, necessary pungency and depth to nearly all culinary preparations. Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices

Cloves (Karabu Nati) Whole, dried flower buds from the clove tree are characterized by their intense, pungent, and warm aroma. Ceylon cloves are prized for their high essential oil content, making them potent for both sweet and savory applications.

Benefits:
▶ Possess strong antioxidant properties.
▶Traditionally used to aid in oral and dental health.
▶ Imparts a classic, aromatic warmth to desserts, beverages, and spiced meats. Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices

cardamom (Enasal) The prized "Queen of Spices." These aromatic, pale-green pods contain dark, sticky seeds with an intense, citrusy, and sweet-spicy flavor. Essential for both complex curries and fine confectionery.

Benefits:
▶ Known for its properties that can assist with healthy breath and oral hygiene.
▶ Traditionally used to aid in digestion and ease stomach discomfort.
▶ Adds a unique, sophisticated aroma and flavor to baked goods, tea, and savory dishes. Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices

Fenugreek seed (Uluhaal) Small, hard, amber-colored seeds with a distinct, slightly bitter, and sweetly aromatic flavor. This spice is essential for tempering, adding depth to curries, and is widely used in traditional medicinal preparations.

Benefits:
▶ Known traditionally to aid in regulating blood sugar levels.
▶ May support healthy digestion and ease heartburn.
▶ Used for its properties that can help support lactation in new mothers Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices Spices

Pure Ceylon Hibiscus Oil (Vadamal Thel) A traditional, nourishing oil extracted from the vibrant petals and seeds of the Hibiscus flower. This rich oil is highly regarded for its deep conditioning properties, making it a natural staple in Ayurvedic hair and skin care.

Benefits (Primarily Cosmetic):
▶ Promotes healthy hair growth and strengthens the hair shaft.
▶ Helps condition hair, reducing frizz and restoring natural shine and softness.
▶ Rich in natural Alpha-Hydroxy Acids (AHAs) and antioxidants to gently exfoliate and improve skin elasticity. Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda

Premium Ceylon White Tea (Silver Tips) The rarest of Ceylon teas, handcrafted exclusively from the delicate, unopened buds of the tea plant. Hand-plucked before sunrise and minimally processed, this tea offers an ethereal, pale liquor with a subtle, sweet, and pure flavor reminiscent of honey and spring blossoms.

Benefits:
▶ Contains the highest concentration of antioxidants (catechins/polyphenols) among all teas, aiding in fighting free radical damage.
▶ May promote cardiovascular health by supporting healthy cholesterol and blood vessel function.
▶ Associated with supporting a healthy metabolism and providing potent anti-aging benefits for the rarest of Ceylon teas, handcrafted exclusively from the delicate, unopened buds of the tea plant. Hand-plucked before sunrise and minimally processed, this tea offers an ethereal, pale liquor with a subtle, sweet, and pure flavor reminiscent of honey and spring blossoms. Cinnamon and Spice Candle A hand-poured candle blending the distinct warmth of authentic Ceylon Cinnamon with evocative notes of other island spices, such as clove and nutmeg. It fills the space with a rich, inviting, and long-lasting aroma.

Benefits (Aromatic and Mood):
▶ Creates a Welcoming Atmosphere: The warm, familiar scent evokes comfort and cozy domesticity.
▶ The aroma of cinnamon is known to help improve focus and mental clarity.
▶ Acts as a natural, subtle way to eliminate household odors while leaving a pleasant, natural fragrance. Sandalwood (Sudu Hadun) Derived from the precious heartwood of the Sandalwood tree (Santalum album). It is renowned for its iconic, warm, sweet, and woody aroma. Used for centuries in Sri Lankan and Ayurvedic traditions for its soothing and spiritual properties.

Benefits (Primarily Traditional/Cosmetic):
▶ Cooling and Calming: Traditionally applied as a paste to the skin to relieve burning sensations, inflammation, and headache.
▶ Promotes a clear and radiant complexion by soothing skin issues, blemishes, and improving tone.
▶ The natural aroma is used in aromatherapy to reduce anxiety, promote mental clarity, and aid in meditation. Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda

Premium Ceylon Black Tea Sourced from Sri Lanka's high-altitude estates, this hand-plucked tea offers a bright, brisk liquor with a full, robust flavor and a subtle citrusy finish. It is celebrated worldwide as a gold standard in black tea.

Benefits:
▶ High Antioxidant Content: Rich in polyphenols that help protect against oxidative stress and support cellular health.
▶ Provides a balanced and sustained energy boost due to the natural combination of caffeine and L-Theanine.
▶ Contains potassium and flavonoids that may help support heart health and regulate blood pressure. Tea Tea Tea Tea Tea Tea Tea Tea Tea Tea

Traditional Sandalwood Incense Sticks Hand-rolled incense crafted from natural wood powder and pure Sandalwood oil, delivering the classic, warm, woody, and sweet aroma of Santalum album. Ideal for creating a serene and meditative atmosphere.

Benefits:
▶ Promotes Relaxation: The soothing scent is widely used in aromatherapy to calm the mind and reduce feelings of stress or anxiety.
▶ Enhances Focus: Creates an ideal environment for meditation, prayer, or study by grounding the senses.
▶ Natural Deodorizer: Naturally purifies the air and leaves a clean, enduring fragrance in your space. Benefits:
▶ Excellent source of natural electrolytes for rapid hydration and recovery.

Pure Ceylon Neem Oil (Kohomba Thel) A potent oil pressed from the seeds of the Neem tree, highly valued in Ayurvedic tradition. It possesses a characteristically strong, pungent aroma and is used topically for its clarifying and protective properties.

Benefits:
▶ Known for its natural antimicrobial properties, aiding in skin and scalp purification.
▶ Helps soothe and moisturize the skin, providing support for various dermatological concerns.
▶ Traditionally used as a natural insect repellent and garden aid. Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda

Ayurvedic Herbal Face Cream A rich, traditional face cream crafted with time-tested Ayurvedic herbs and oils. Formulated to provide deep nourishment, this cream blends potent botanicals like Sandalwood, Aloe Vera, and natural emollients to promote a balanced, healthy complexion. kumkumadi Tailam Tradlnka Kumkumadi Thailam is an authentic Ayurvedic facial oil crafted with saffron and a blend of natural herbs. This traditional formula works to improve the appearance of the skin by providing essential nutrients. It is a gentle way to brighten the complexion and maintain a healthy, youthful look.
▶Brightens the Face: Saffron helps to lighten the skin and provides a natural, healthy radiance.
▶Fades Dark Spots: Regular application assists in reducing the appearance of blemishes and pigmentation. Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda Ayurveda

Sri Lankan Naga Raksha Mask Hand Carved Kaduru Wood This traditional Sri Lankan mask represents the Naga Raksha or cobra demon. It is a genuine piece of handmade folk art used in ancient dance rituals and cultural ceremonies. Skilled artisans produce each handmade sculpture to serve as a protective wall hanging for the home. The wood carving features vibrant colors and intricate patterns that define the heritage of local island craftsmanship.

▶ Color: Multicolored with dominant red and yellow pigments.

▶ Size: 12 inches in height and 10 inches in width.

▶ Material: Sustainably sourced Kaduru wood.

▶ Origin: Sri Lanka. Handicrafts Handicrafts Handicrafts Handicrafts Handicrafts Handicrafts Handicrafts Handicrafts Handicrafts Handicrafts

Ceylon Naga Sanni Mask Ritual Healing Hand Carved Kaduru Wood The Naga Sanni mask is a central figure in the ancient healing ceremonies practiced in the southern regions of the country. This handmade sculpture represents the cobra demon which is traditionally associated with ailments of the eyes and respiratory system. Each handmade mask is meticulously shaped by local craftsmen to capture the fierce expression and distinct cobra hood characteristic of this deity. It is a significant piece of folk art that reflects the rich spiritual history of the island.

▶ Color: Vibrant red and yellow with black accents
▶Size: 10 inches in height and 8 inches in width
▶Material: Natural Kaduru wood
▶Origin: Sri Lanka Handicrafts Handicrafts Handicrafts Handicrafts Handicrafts Handicrafts Handicrafts Handicrafts Handicrafts Handicrafts

Ceylon Butha Sanni Mask Ritual Exorcism Hand Painted Kaduru Wood The Butha Sanni mask is an essential component of the traditional Sanni Yakuma healing ritual performed on the island. This handmade wood carving represents the spirit associated with madness and mental disturbances. Each handmade piece is crafted by local artisans who use ancient techniques to create the distinct facial features and unsettling expression of the demon. This traditional folk art is an ideal choice for collectors of cultural artifacts and spiritual decor.

▶ Colour: Dark base with contrasting white and red accents
▶ Size: 12 inches in height and 9 inches in width
▶ Material: Sustainable Kaduru wood
▶ Origin: Sri Lanka Handicrafts Handicrafts Handicrafts Handicrafts Handicrafts Handicrafts Handicrafts Handicrafts Handicrafts Handicrafts

Ceylon Ekel Broom Heavy Duty Coconut Midrib This Ceylon Ekel Broom serves as a reliable tool for sweeping garden paths and outdoor yards. Every handmade unit consists of several dozen coconut leaf midribs bound tightly together to create a stiff brush. Because the materials are completely organic this tool is an excellent choice for environmentally conscious homes. Local makers ensure each handmade broom is sturdy enough for daily use while remaining a fully organic and biodegradable product.

Color: Natural brown and tan
Size: 50 inches in length
Material: Organic Coconut Leaf Midrib Coconut Products Coconut Products Coconut Products Coconut Products Coconut Products Coconut Products Coconut Products Coconut Products Coconut Products Coconut Products

It is a handmade product that undergoes a delicate semi-oxidation process to develop its characteristic floral profile and smooth finish. Because it is an organic product, it contains no artificial preservatives or synthetic flavors.
